---
title: "Changelog"
toc: true
---

Development and releases are tracked on GitHub:

::: {.content-block .text-center}

[View on GitHub](https://github.com/GRAP-UdL-AT/FruitMeasureApp){.btn-action .btn-action-primary .btn}

[See Releases](https://github.com/GRAP-UdL-AT/FruitMeasureApp/releases){.btn-action .btn-action-secondary .btn}

:::

## Version 1.0.0

### Flutter App

**Initial public release of FruitMeasureApp**

- Mobile application available on Android and iOS  
- AI-based fruit detection and diameter estimation from images  
- Support for single and multiple fruit measurements  
- Integration of reference marker for geometric calibration  
- Designed for real field conditions  

### Models

- First version of the inference pipeline implemented  
- Training pipeline available  
- Support for:
  - Fruit mode  
  - Corimbe mode  

## Notes

- This is the first stable version released to the public  
- Application is available in mobile app stores  
- Model inference and training pipelines are included in this release  


## TODO

### App

- [ ] Confirm exact release date  
- [ ] Add Google Play link  
- [ ] Add App Store link  
- [ ] Specify supported Android/iOS versions  
- [ ] Add screenshots of the released version  

### Model

- [ ] Specify model architecture. 
- [ ] Add dataset description (size, type, annotation process)  
- [ ] Provide evaluation metrics (e.g., error in mm, accuracy)  
- [ ] Document training procedure  
- [ ] Add inference performance details (speed, device requirements)  

### Features

- [ ] List supported fruit types  
- [ ] Clarify limitations (lighting, occlusion, distance constraints)  
- [ ] Add calibration details (marker size, assumptions)  

### Hardware (Support)

- [ ] Add STL download links  
- [ ] Add assembly instructions   
- [ ] Document recommended usage setup  

### Documentation

- [ ] Link to full documentation  
- [ ] Add usage tutorial  
- [ ] Add FAQ section
